scope: Color standards, color-management systems, display calibration tools, grading tools, open-source calibration, and profile standards

rows.buyer: motion picture, television, VFX, mastering, archiving, and remastering teams
rows.official_positioning: Industry standard for managing color throughout the life cycle of motion picture and television production, from capture through editing, VFX, mastering, public presentation, archiving, and remastering.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: ACES standardizes color workflow assumptions, but it is not itself a proof packet binding source code, transform implementation, numerical error thresholds, display state, and verifier receipts.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Build Color can emit receipt-backed transform probes for ACES-adjacent workflows while Telos records the source, action, and verifier chain around the result.

rows.buyer: VFX, animation, rendering, compositing, and production pipeline teams
rows.official_positioning: Complete color management solution geared toward motion picture production, with emphasis on visual effects and computer animation.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: OpenColorIO carries color-management configuration and transforms; Build Color/Telos can add numerical receipt thresholds, action provenance, and expected-failure fixtures around those transforms.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Treat OCIO configs as evidence inputs and generate proof kits that verify transform assumptions and output tolerances.

rows.buyer: professional calibrators, home theater calibrators, display manufacturers, broadcast and production display teams
rows.official_positioning: Calibration software for calibrating and validating displays, with hardware support, customized workflows, reports, and product tiers for professional and consumer calibration.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: Calman can produce calibration workflows and reports; Telos can wrap those reports with source/workspace provenance, model/tool action receipts, non-mutation boundaries, and external verifier verdicts.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Build Color should not claim to replace Calman hardware workflows; it should become a receipt layer around transforms, reports, and software-side validation.

rows.buyer: film, broadcast, post-production, Pro AV, and home cinema calibration users
rows.official_positioning: Advanced 3D LUT calibration and color management software for film, broadcast, post-production, Pro AV, and home cinema users.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: ColourSpace is strong at LUT and calibration workflows; Build Color/Telos can add portable proof packets that keep measurement assumptions, transform code, thresholds, and failure boundaries explicit.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Use ColourSpace-style 3D LUT workflows as market proof that calibration buyers value evidence, then compete on portable proof receipts rather than hardware control.

rows.buyer: colorists, editors, filmmakers, broadcast teams, and post-production facilities
rows.official_positioning: Color page for creative and technical color manipulation, grading, scopes, balancing, and advanced color correction in DaVinci Resolve.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: Resolve is a production tool and grading environment; Telos can export review packets for declared color assumptions, image artifact hashes, transform receipts, and measurement verdicts outside the project UI.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Build Color can supply deterministic transform and difference-metric receipts for reviewable Resolve-adjacent deliverables.

rows.buyer: photographers, designers, display calibration users, open-source color-management users
rows.official_positioning: Display calibration and profiling solution focused on accuracy and versatility, powered by ArgyllCMS for measurements, calibrations, profiles, and advanced color tasks.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: DisplayCAL records calibration/profiling work through ArgyllCMS; Telos can add source/action receipts, no-mutation proof modes, and machine-checkable proof-kit boundaries.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Use DisplayCAL/Argyll-style flows as adapter targets for open calibration proof packets.

rows.buyer: color-management engineers, open-source calibration users, profiling tool builders
rows.official_positioning: Open-source ICC-compatible color management system supporting ICC profile creation for scanners, cameras, film recorders, printers, and displays.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: ArgyllCMS provides low-level calibration and profiling capabilities; Telos can attach modern proof-packet receipts, market-facing validation summaries, and model/tool provenance around those commands.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Build Color should interoperate with Argyll-style measurement records and preserve them as claim-level evidence.

rows.buyer: vendors and workflow owners needing open, cross-platform color management
rows.official_positioning: Promotes open, vendor-neutral, cross-platform color management systems and encourages support for ICC profile format and workflows.
rows.proof_receipt_gap: ICC defines profile standards and workflows; Telos can bind specific profile use, transform implementation, measured numerical error, and review verdicts into portable proof packets.
rows.build_color_wedge_hypothesis: Build Color proof kits should explicitly name ICC/PCS/profile assumptions when verifying color transforms or calibration-adjacent claims.
